SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class EntrantEventListTest

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
public class EntrantEventListTest extends Object
Instrumented UI tests for EntrantEventListActivity.

User Stories Tested: US 01.01.03 – As an entrant, I want to be able to see a list of events that I can join the waiting list for. US 01.01.04 – As an entrant, I want to filter events based on my interests and availability.

Tests use a temporary Firestore collection (events_test) to avoid interfering with production data.

Author:
Kito Lee Son

  • Constructor Details

    • EntrantEventListTest

      public EntrantEventListTest()

  • Method Details

    • setupFirestoreData

      public void setupFirestoreData() throws InterruptedException
      Prepares test data in Firestore before each test runs.

      This method inserts a test organizer and several events into the events_test collection, then launches EntrantEventListActivity.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the Firestore insertion wait is interrupted

    • withListSize

      public static androidx.test.espresso.ViewAssertion withListSize(int expectedSize)
      Returns a ViewAssertion that verifies the number of items displayed in a ListView.

      This helper method simplifies UI assertions by allowing tests to confirm that the ListView contains an expected number of events.

      Parameters:
      expectedSize - expected number of items in the ListView
      Returns:
      a ViewAssertion that checks the ListView item count

    • testDisplayedEventsMatchDatabase

      public void testDisplayedEventsMatchDatabase() throws InterruptedException
      Verifies that events inserted into Firestore appear in the entrant event list.

      The test waits for the ListView to populate and then checks that all events in the database are displayed to the user.

      User Story Tested: US 01.01.03 – As an entrant, I want to be able to see a list of events that I can join the waiting list for.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the wait operation is interrupted

    • testCategoryFiltering

      public void testCategoryFiltering()
      Tests that category filtering updates the displayed event list correctly.

      The test opens the category filter dialog, selects categories, and verifies that only events matching those categories remain visible.

      User Story Tested: US 01.01.04 – As an entrant, I want to filter events based on my interests and availability.

    • cleanupFirestoreData

      public void cleanupFirestoreData() throws InterruptedException
      Removes all test data from Firestore after each test.

      This method deletes documents from events_test and users_test collections to ensure tests do not affect each other or pollute the production database.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the cleanup wait operation is interrupted
